prompt: Photoreal high-end 3D animated feature film, cinematic anamorphic look. FIGHTER A, the Sponge Fighter: a bright-yellow rectangular kitchen-sponge creature with porous sponge texture and holes along his sides, big round blue eyes, two big front buck teeth, skinny noodle arms and legs, wearing a small flowing RED CAPE, aviator goggles, white karate sparring gloves, plain blue shorts and black shoes. His face is set in fierce determined concentration. His powers: lightning-fast karate, blowing giant glistening soap bubbles, and sponge resilience where impacts squash him flat like an accordion and he springs back unharmed. FIGHTER B, the Green Gladiator: a colossal green-skinned muscle giant, heavy scowling brow, shaggy dark hair, a bronze spiked pauldron strapped on his left shoulder, leather bracers on both forearms, bold white tribal war paint striped across his chest and face, ragged dark-gray shorts, barefoot, three times taller than the sponge. He wields a massive two-handed STONE WAR HAMMER. His powers: earth-shattering strength, a two-handed thunderclap that fires a visible ring-shaped shockwave, skyscraper leaps into ground-pound impacts, and a rage mode where his war paint glows green and his muscles swell. SETTING: an ancient stone ruins arena on a mountain plateau at storm dusk, heavy rain, rain-slicked flagstones with puddles reflecting lightning, mist rolling between broken pillars, warm fire glow in the distance. STYLE: teal-and-orange cinematic grade, cool blue storm shadows with warm amber rim light, volumetric rain and mist, film grain, shallow depth of field on close-ups. Intense but clean PG action: absolutely no blood, no gore, no injuries shown; impacts read as water spray, mist bursts, shockwaves and sparks. No text, no HUD, no interface graphics anywhere. No dialogue; thunder, rain and deep cinematic impacts in the audio. SCENE 4 of 5 (15 seconds), shot list: SCENE OPENS exactly on this composition: wide shot, the Green Gladiator on one knee with the stone hammer lying flat on the stones beside him, the Sponge Fighter in a low stance in the foreground rain. 0-4s RAGE MODE: close-up of the gladiator's face as his eyes ignite and the white war paint across his chest and face begins to GLOW GREEN; his muscles visibly swell; he rises, abandoning the hammer, steam boiling off his shoulders in the rain. 4-7s: he slams his palms together in a thunderclap; the ring-shaped shockwave rips the rain sheet apart in slow motion and hurls the sponge tumbling backward across the flooded stones. 7-12s: berserk barrage: the glowing gladiator rains huge fists down as the sponge weaves and ducks between them in extreme slow motion, each miss detonating the flagstones with water and sparks; one graze catches the cape and sends the sponge skidding across the stones on his knees. 12-15s: the gladiator crouches and LEAPS skyward into the storm, both fists raised overhead, silhouetted against a blinding fork of lightning, while the sponge kneels in the foreground catching his breath. FINAL FRAME, HOLD LAST 1.5 SECONDS: low wide shot, the Sponge Fighter kneeling in the foreground looking up, the glowing Green Gladiator high in the storm sky above, fists overhead, lightning silhouetting him.
